nodes.label: Use the charset encoding in the Content-Type header if possible.
Default to utf-8 encoding if there is no Content-Type header.
Fallback to utf-8 if we get an invalid charset in the Content-Type header.
A response with ascii encoded content should decode correctly,     even with no
A response with UTF-8 encoded content should decode correctly,     even with no
A response with ISO 8859-1 encoded content should decode correctly,     even wit
A response with Windows 1252 encoded content should decode correctly,     even w
Default to attempting utf-8 encoding for non-text content-type headers.
